reviews.comment:
Estuve en marzo 2025, excelente habitacion, hotel a nuevo! El desayuno en la YPF es cafe con leche y dos mediaslunas todo de buen sabor servido con onda neutra.- Hotel muy recomendable.-

(Translated by Google)
I stayed in March 2025, excellent room, brand new hotel! Breakfast at the YPF station is coffee with milk and two croissants, all tasty and served in a neutral style. Highly recommended hotel.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURJb2FQUjlBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Cargamos el 31/3 y el precio de super era $1070. El resto de las YPF de Chubut tenían la super a $1034. El 1/4 el resto de las YPF subió a $1047 muy por debajo de este precio. Carguen antes o después.  Esta estación es MUY CARA.

(Translated by Google)
We filled up on March 31st, and the Super price was $1,070. The rest of the YPF stations in Chubut had Super at $1,034. On April 1st, the rest of the YPF stations went up to $1,047, well below this price. Fill up sooner or later. This station is VERY EXPENSIVE.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURJMk4tYm1BRRAB

reviews.comment:
La nafta super es bastante más cara que cargar en YPF de Paso de Indios, recomiendo no cargar ahí.

(Translated by Google)
Super gasoline is considerably more expensive than filling up at YPF in Paso de Indios, so I recommend not filling up there.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURJMkpmb2lnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Ideal porque esta a mitad de camino y si bien en el full faltaban algunos menú alcanza para descansar un rato y seguir camino

(Translated by Google)
Ideal because it is halfway there and although the full menu was missing some, it is enough to rest for a while and continue on your way.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUN3dDYtNDVnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Ypf y ACA... Si están juntos no puede fallar. Excelente atención, la mejor predisposición ante cualquier consulta. Mención especial al full ( o Servicompras, la verdad que no recuerdo ahora). Sobresaliente

(Translated by Google)
YPF and ACA... If they're together, you can't go wrong. Excellent service, always ready to help with any questions. Special mention to the full service (or Servicompras, I honestly can't remember which one). Outstanding
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUN3bnVldVRREAE

reviews.comment:
Es una parada obligatoria en la ruta. La estación de servicio está renovada pero siguen vendiendo sus tradicionales sanguches de jamón crudo.

(Translated by Google)
It's a must-stop on the route. The gas station has been renovated, but they still sell their traditional prosciutto sandwiches.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURRaWZpODRnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Completo y limpio, los sándwiches ricos pero solo el pan se ve casero y $ 6.000 cada uno me resultaron caros

(Translated by Google)
Complete and clean, the sandwiches are delicious but only the bread looks homemade and $6,000 each seemed expensive to me.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNHb28tclJBEAE

reviews.comment:
Como estamos pasando unos días en Los Altares vamos todo el tiempo a comprar. La atención del personal es muy correcta y son muy amables todos. Algunas veces el local está lleno, pero solo hay que tener paciencia y saber esperar.

(Translated by Google)
Since we're spending a few days in Los Altares, we're constantly going shopping. The staff are very helpful and friendly. Sometimes the store is crowded, but you just need to be patient and know when to wait.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNRejZudGtnRRAB
